title: Funding Sources
description: The sources of funding that supported the data collection.

organization.title: Funding Organization
organization.description: Name and other details about the organization that provided the funding.

grants.title: Funding Awards
grants.description: Identifiers and other details about financial support for the data collection.
grants.usageNotes: Whenever possible, include a unique identifier for the funding award. This can be a grant number; a URL, preferably a persistent one like a digital object identifier (DOI); or both.

grant_number.title: Funding Identifier
grant_number.description: The unique identifier for the funding (e.g., ABC-0123456).

grant_uri.title: Funding URL
grant_uri.description: A unique identifier (URL), preferably a persistent one like a DOI,  linking to a landing page with funding information.

order.title: Order
order.description: Internal ICPSR field used to determine the order of importance for the funders associated with the data collection.
